title: Grilled Flaxseed Skewers with Portuguese Seasoning
description: A flavorful and healthy dish that combines the nutty taste of flaxseed with the spicy kick of Portuguese seasoning. Perfect for a quick and easy snack or side dish.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together flaxseeds, portuguese seasoning, roasted red peppers, onion, and garlic.
Thread the skewer mixture onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly charred.
Serve hot with a squeeze of lemon juice.
